artPrompt: A battered jalopy clown car bursting open in steep foreshortening, doors flung wide as a chaotic spray of grinning little red imps tumbles toward the viewer trailing greasepaint and ember sparks. Tattered striped carnival tents and rigged wheels glow behind under hot-gold firelight and sickly neon, scattered dice rolling across the dirt, kinetic carnival pandemonium, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Clown Car of Imps
text:
When Clown Car of Imps enters the battlefield, roll a six-sided die and create that many 1/1 red Imp creature tokens. (How did they all fit in there? Nobody knows. Nobody asks.)
Crew 2
flavorText: Seats two. Holds eleven. Smells like greasepaint and bad decisions.
